title: Raw Nuggets
description: Adds raw nuggets of ore that randomly drop along with their corresponding raw ore (e.g. gold ore drops raw gold and a few raw gold nuggets.) Also adds copper nuggets.
body:
# Raw Nuggets

Get more from your metallic ores! Ores with raw drops can now drop a little more in the form of raw nuggets. Current ores that have raw nuggets:

- Copper
- Gold
- Iron

These raw nuggets smelt so fast, you use almost the same amount of coal per ingot! (furnaces are a little worse and blast furnaces are a little better.)
